synopsis:
The once-renowned Huajian Sect faces a bankruptcy crisis due to its leader's disappearance and massive debts. Senior Sister Hua Xiangrong is tasked with reviving the "Unparalleled Martial Arts Weekly," reporting on major and minor events in the martial arts world. Before them comes a charming, wealthy, and handsome man; after them comes a beautiful but foolish woman suffering from amnesia; their unreliable junior brothers and sisters are a handful; and creditors are coming to compete with other martial arts practitioners. Martial arts work is tough, but fortunately, the sect unites to overcome difficulties! We are unparalleled, we are unique! Heroes passing by, grab a copy of the new weekly!

(Source: Bilibili, translated)
